title: Fine-Tune Help Icon Styling, Tooltips, and Analytics Classes
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the help window icons to be visually prominent with clear tooltips, so that I can easily identify and use the available support options.
description:
Refinements to the help window icons introduced in MBT-402 to improve visual prominence, add analytics tracking, and provide descriptive tooltips.

### Styling Updates
Help icons received updated CSS to increase size and spacing:
- `font-size: 22px`
- `padding-bottom: 10px`
- `line-height: 0px`
- `margin-right: 5px`

The help window title was changed to "Need Help?" for a friendlier tone.

### Analytics Classes
Each help icon was assigned a dedicated CSS class for analytics tracking:
- `HelpIconBook` — schedule a session icon
- `HelpIconEmail` — email support icon
- `HelpIconChat` — live chat icon

### Tooltips
Descriptive tooltips were added to each icon:
- Book icon: "Book Session"
- Email icon: "Email Us"
- Chat icon: "Chat Live (during business hours)"

### Chat Icon Fix
The Zoho chat icon click handler was fixed — previously, clicking the chat icon on a fresh page load did nothing until the Zoho widget was manually initialized. The fix ensures the widget initializes on chat icon click.
acceptance_criteria: Help icons display at 22px font-size with proper spacing
Book session icon has CSS class 'HelpIconBook'
Chat icon tooltip displays 'Chat Live (during business hours)'
Clicking the chat icon on a fresh page load correctly opens the Zoho chat window
ux_changes: Increased help icon size and spacing for better visibility. Added descriptive tooltips to each icon. Changed the help window title to 'Need Help?'. Assigned unique CSS classes to each icon for analytics tracking. Fixed chat icon to correctly initialize and open the Zoho widget on first click.
implementation_notes: CSS classes (HelpIconBook, HelpIconEmail, HelpIconChat) were added for analytics event tracking. The Zoho chat widget initialization was moved to fire on chat icon click rather than relying on prior manual interaction with the bottom-left chat widget.
comment_summary: Developer deployed styling and class changes to staging. Reporter identified that the chat icon did nothing on fresh page load — it only worked after the Zoho widget was manually opened and minimized first. A fix was deployed to staging to properly initialize the Zoho widget on chat icon click.
